content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative self-improvement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid self-refinement system that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no additional training or supervision while boosting output quality over single-perspective iteration. This hybrid approach leverages the natural inconsistency of an LLM’s own generation across different prompting frames to create critical feedback that is more diverse than static single-perspective self-feedback.
